# Contributing
Thank you for your interest in contributing!
## How to contribute
1. **Issues**: Report bugs and suggest features via GitHub Issues.
2. **Source code**: Lives in the [monorepo](https://github.com/coderbuzz/codex). Submit PRs there.
3. **Documentation**: Maintained as `DOCS.md` in the monorepo.
4. **Questions**: Use GitHub Discussions.
## Code of Conduct
Be respectful and constructive. We aim to foster an inclusive community.
